prompt: Bridge node with positive toCall and acceptable price: choose action.
why_v1: When the price is manageable and still acceptable to continue, calling keeps the hand in play without forcing extra aggression or stretching into a raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The price is manageable, so calling keeps the hand in play without forcing extra aggression or stretching into a raise.
feedback_acceptable_v1: Acceptable. Folding avoids a bigger leak, but this manageable price is still good enough that calling keeps more value in play.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Folding gives up too much at a manageable price and manageable continue price, and calling keeps the hand in play while raising forces extra aggression when the cleaner line is to call.
